introSection: Figure Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by manufacturer L.A. Thompson Gravity Switchback Railway Company previously located at North Parade Amusement Park in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was scrapped in January 1970.
fullText: Figure Eight was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by manufacturer L.A. Thompson Gravity Switchback Railway Company previously located at North Parade Amusement Park in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was scrapped in January 1970.
